case_summaries.note: article-class hybrid case keeps planner intent, internal exact compute, executor receipt, and final language answer as distinct typed trajectory entries
verifier-attached search case keeps planner, compute, verifier, and final response boundaries explicit instead of flattening search into one opaque span
external-tool fallback case keeps explicit planner-to-tool delegation and sandbox receipt boundaries separate from the surrounding language spans

claim_boundary: this report checks schema roundtrip, lane handoff correctness, receipt-boundary explicitness, and outcome parity over the seeded mixed trajectory suite. It remains an execution-truth artifact family and does not imply accepted-outcome closure or market settlement
summary: Mixed trajectory report now covers 3 seeded hybrid cases with schema_roundtrip=10000bps, lane_handoff_correctness=10000bps, and trajectory_to_outcome_parity=10000bps.
